race.description: Mel & Craig Manley Albies Alumni All Stars Handicap
race.comment: VIERVILLE (5) kept fresh for this and back in class and trip fourth-up. Jumped quickly and found wanting in the straight with a fading fifth over 1200m at Scone in C4 grade. Senior rider goes on and look for a better performance. CONCOCTION (2) lightly-raced gelding resuming. Won two-in-a-row before heading to town with a battling tenth at Randwick in Highway class over 1400m last November. Back without a trial and has genuine top-three prospects. SOLAR BLAST (7) impressed in starts for the new yard and kept fresh for this. Bounced off his sound first-up second with a well deserved victory over 1000m at Scone in BM58 grade. Maps well and can stalk the fast tempo. Each way. LOVE CHILD (9) tough win two-back, then failed to finish off with a battling fifth over 1200m at Newcastle. Claim helps and stays in the mix at the good odds.
